_note: Demo fixture standing in for a real sync_external_signals.py run that had Slack/GitHub credentials. Used to showcase the deterministic triager. No real secrets.

signals.title: Sentence-case headings without mangling acronyms
signals.body: Headings get fully lower-cased and SSO becomes Sso. Acceptance: SSO stays SSO, API stays API, 'HELLO WORLD' becomes 'Hello world'. Verify with: python -m pytest tests/test_sentence_case.py -q

signals.title: hey can someone look at the flaky login test
signals.body: the login test is flaky and fails sometimes on CI, please fix when you get a chance
